summary: Add/Remove Item to Order Feature - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 14/14 API tests pass. Frontend: Full e2e flow verified including search, add item, remove item with toast notifications.
passed_tests: POST /api/sysbook/orders/admin/{order_id}/items - adds item from inventory to order
Add item with invalid book_id returns 404
Add item to invalid order returns 404
UI: Open order details via eye icon
UI: Add Item button visible in order details dialog
UI: Search dialog opens with grade-filtered results
UI: + button adds item and shows success toast
UI: Remove item (trash) buttons visible for each item
UI: Confirm/cancel UI shown on remove click
UI: Remove confirms and shows toast with 'Presale qty updated'
seed_data_creation: No new seed data. Used existing order ord_2c25f96fd214 (Sergio Wang, G5) for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Add/Remove Item to Order feature fully working. POST /api/sysbook/orders/admin/{order_id}/items adds items and increments reserved_quantity. DELETE /api/sysbook/orders/admin/{order_id}/items/{book_id} removes items and decrements reserved_quantity. Frontend AddItemToOrder component (line 97) searches inventory filtered by order grade and excludes existing items. RemoveItemButton (line 201) shows confirm/cancel UI before deletion. Toast notifications confirm both operations. Search requires 2+ characters per frontend validation.
